{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gary Oak

|desc=When Ash was trapped under his {{AP|Snorlax}}, Gary challenged him to a Pokémon battle in which Ash's Pikachu would go up against his {{p|Charizard}}. Ash shortly imagined that battle, but he was unable to actually accept Gary's challenge.}}
